queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between the absence of a checking account and elevated credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical investigation into the correlation between checking account balances below zero and mitigated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of radio or TV.
queries.question: Assessment of loan purposes for radio or TV purchases as determinants of reduced credit risk profiles.
